tweets.text: Why do Bitcoiners think $20K Bitcoin is so unlikely when it traded below that level just 3.5 years ago? That’s not a long time. It’s not unusual for stocks to make 3.5-year lows, so why wouldn’t Bitcoin do the same thing, especially given that it’s more volatile than most stocks?

thread_tweets.text: Why do Bitcoiners think $20K Bitcoin is so unlikely when it traded below that level just 3.5 years ago? That’s not a long time. thread_tweets.full_text: Why do Bitcoiners think $20K Bitcoin is so unlikely when it traded below that level just 3.5 years ago? That’s not a long time. It’s not unusual for stocks to make 3.5-year lows, so why wouldn’t Bitcoin do the same thing, especially given that it’s more volatile than most stocks?

id say overall, qatar 2022 and russia's 2018 world cups were alright

brazil's 2014 and south africa 2010 was huge, especially south africa one, maybe cus smart phone + iphone just went viral back then

but this one feels bigger

the fact that we've only ever had 4 world cups since iphone became a thing.. is mind blowing

now we have so much more devices, ai, data centers, life has changed super significantly, with robotics and vr in the horizon

cant imagine what world is like in another 3-4 world cups

@AlwaysBeThinkin i thought this too
